top_words: risk, sdg, million, sdgs, global, exposure, assessment, national, livestock, environmental
theme_label: Global food system risk / SDG indicators
notes: Used as a governance/development control in all models. Captures broad food system vulnerability beyond production.

top_words: global, land, change, climate, future, loss, production, mitigation, agricultural, emission
proxy_variable: Arable land per capita (ha); agricultural CO2 emissions (kt)
notes: Land availability is a core production-side predictor. Emissions proxy captures land-use intensity.

top_words: system, agricultural, sustainable, development, policy, soil, agriculture, service, crop, goal
proxy_variable: Rule of Law Index; government agricultural expenditure (% GDP)
dataset_source: World Bank WDI / World Governance Indicators
notes: Governance quality is a robustness check variable per the proposal. Included in specification 5.

top_words: climate, change, health, scenario, risk, impact, flood, adaptation, global, variability
proxy_variable: Temperature anomaly (°C deviation from long-run mean); rainfall variability (CV of annual precipitation)
notes: Aligned with Mbow et al. (2019 IPCC): temperature and rainfall variability are robust cross-country yield predictors.

top_words: soil, global, research, review, system, loss, bibliometric, world, spatial, degradation
proxy_variable: FAO Food Loss and Waste rate (%) — cereals harvest to retail
dataset_source: FAO Food Loss and Waste Database
notes: Maps directly to the post-harvest loss block. Soil degradation and storage losses overlap in SSA contexts (Affognon et al. 2015).

top_words: household, farmer, income, farm, climate, change, adaptation, crop, market, access
proxy_variable: Account ownership (% adults age 15+); mobile money users (%)
dataset_source: Global Findex 2021 / IMF Financial Access Survey
notes: Primary financial access proxy. Burke et al. (2015): credit effects conditional on farm size — marginal R² gain C–B tests this directly.

top_words: waste, soil, poverty, maize, organic, yield, production, practice, measure, agriculture
theme_label: Agricultural waste yield gaps & CSA practices
proxy_variable: Cereal post-harvest loss rate (%) — alternative PHL measure; yield gap (actual vs attainable t/ha)
dataset_source: FAO Food Loss and Waste Database / FAOSTAT
notes: Second PHL proxy — used in robustness check alongside Topic 4 proxy to test PHL measurement sensitivity (R3 mapping bias risk).

top_words: crop, global, yield, production, climate, maize, impact, area, change, chain
proxy_variable: Cereal yield (kg/ha); fertiliser use (kg/ha); irrigated area (% of cropland)
notes: Core production baseline predictors. Fertiliser efficiency (yield/kg input) engineered from these per Tittonell & Giller (2013).

top_words: disease, plant, crop, learning, leaf, machine, technology, detection, challenge, solution
proxy_variable: ICT infrastructure index (% internet users); agricultural technology adoption
notes: Supports the ML methodology justification in the dissertation. Not a primary predictor — used in robustness specification 4 (infrastructure block).
